areaLabel: Reed Ferry Road and Ferry Camp Slice
notes: Eleventh real slice keeps the back-half cadence moving by reusing the shared clerk -> sentry -> gate -> shop -> chest -> encounter chain, but re-frames it as the first ferry handoff on the eastern marsh route. The new pressure is not a new runtime branch; it is proving the same chapter-factory workflow still closes a route handoff slice while keeping reference gaps and visual backlog explicit. / 第十一段真实切片继续复用共享的文吏 -> 守兵 -> 栅门 -> 商店 -> 宝箱 -> 遭遇战链路，但把它改造成东向沼泽路线上的第一个渡口交接切片。新增压力不在新的 runtime 分支，而在于验证同一套 chapter-factory 工艺仍能稳定闭合“路线交接”章节，同时把 reference 缺口与视觉 backlog 显式记录下来。
title: Reed Ferry Crossing
